name: product-branding-review
expected_outputs: recommendations for audience, value proposition and direction
safety_limits: do not write files during checklist execution
keep recommendations advisory unless implementation is explicitly requested
do not import business-specific branding into Atlas core
do not present taste as certainty without rationale
forbidden_actions: generate generic branding defaults as final output
human_approval_triggers: the task shifts from review to implementation
the user asks to overwrite existing branding assets
the review would require external tooling or MCP activation
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill returns a read-only checklist
validations: recommendations stay advisory unless implementation is requested
